action_set_definitions.name: get_alert_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state and internal profile of a specific AML alert.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert (e.g., AML-2024-505).

action_set_definitions.name: get_trade_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific trade documentation data including invoice details, shipping parties, and vessel info.

alert_id.description: The alert ID associated with the trade transaction.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_pricing_index
action_set_definitions.description: Queries global market databases for the current fair market value of specific commodities or equipment.

commodity_type.description: The category of goods (e.g., 'solar energy equipment').

action_set_definitions.name: track_vessel_movement
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves historical AIS data and voyage logs for a specific vessel using its IMO number.

imo_number.description: The International Maritime Organization unique vessel identifier.

action_set_definitions.name: get_corporate_ubo
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Ultimate Beneficial Ownership (UBO) structure for a legal entity.

entity_name.description: The full name of the company to investigate.

action_set_definitions.name: update_investigation_log
action_set_definitions.description: Appends a finding or note to the internal investigation log for the alert.

finding_summary.description: Specific evidence or observation found during the step.

action_set_definitions.name: close_alert_disposition
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the final disposition of the alert to either filed (SAR) or closed.

justification.description: Detailed reasoning based on evidence gathered.

state_description.alert_id: The unique identifier for the AML alert being reviewed.
state_description.alert_status: The current stage of the workflow (e.g., OPEN, UNDER_REVIEW, PENDING_APPROVAL, CLOSED).
state_description.assigned_investigator: The ID or name of the human or agent currently assigned to the case.
state_description.risk_score: The system-generated risk score (0-100) based on initial triggers.
state_description.internal_investigation_log: A private list of all actions taken and notes added, used to track environment evolution.
state_description.customer_risk_profile: Internal record of customer risk factors (e.g., PEP status, country risk).
